title: iberis virginica
intro: Iberis virginica, also known as Virgin's Bower or Candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat a variety of health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant. Iberis virginica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and poultices for topical application.
